items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm the existence or functionality of the required rate limiting on public pages. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured to validate this outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence to support the validation of the rate limiting scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
